products.name: Obsidian Chronograph
products.description: Swiss-movement chronograph with a matte black ceramic case and sapphire crystal. Water resistant to 100m.

products.name: Noir Leather Bifold
products.description: Full-grain calfskin leather, hand-stitched gold thread. Holds 8 cards. Ages beautifully.

products.name: 24K Gold Fountain Pen
products.description: Matte black resin barrel with 24K gold-plated nib. Writes with rare, effortless precision.

products.name: Velvet Candle — Oud
products.description: Hand-poured soy wax in a matte black vessel. Notes of aged oud, cedarwood, and dark amber. 60-hour burn.

products.name: Carbon Silk Tie
products.description: 100% Mulberry silk with a subtle carbon-weave texture. Cut in Milan. Width 7.5cm.

products.name: Ebony Chess Set
products.description: Hand-carved ebony and maple pieces on a lacquered board with brass inlay corners. A statement object.

products.name: Midnight Tote
products.description: Structured pebbled leather with brass hardware. Fits a 15" laptop. Unlined interior shows raw leather.

products.name: Black Label Whisky Glass
products.description: Set of 2. Hand-blown crystal with a weighted base and gold rim. Dishwasher safe.

products.name: Merino Overcoat
products.description: Double-faced Merino wool in charcoal black. Unstructured shoulders, horn buttons. Made in Florence.

products.name: Onyx Cufflinks
products.description: Natural black onyx set in gold-plated sterling silver. Engravable. Presented in a silk-lined box.

products.name: Gold-Dipped Card Case
products.description: Brushed stainless steel with 18K gold-dipped edges. Holds 12 cards. Magnetically sealed.

products.name: Leather Journal
products.description: Full-grain black leather cover, hand-stitched spine, 200 pages of 120gsm ivory laid paper. A book worth filling.
